description: Android thin-client payment terminal — base UI + palm-vein capture with on-device 1:N match + card reader SPoC passthrough + PGW API client; no rail SDKs or EMV kernel on-device

actors.name: Payments Gateway
actors.description: Central PGW that terminal calls via /v1/*

fields.name: palm_template_id
fields.label: Opaque palm template id (local; resolved via PGW)

privacy: MUST: palm templates never leave the device (POPIA s.26)
MUST: 1:N palm match runs on-device; only matched template_id crosses the network
security: MUST: terminal ↔ PGW connection is mTLS with device attestation on every call
MUST: card data never stored on device; SPoC-encrypted and forwarded immediately
offline: SHOULD: UI displays 'cannot accept payments offline' when PGW unreachable — no on-device decisioning

anti_patterns.rule: Do not call payment rails directly from the device — always through PGW
anti_patterns.why: Required by terminal-thin-client contract — violating this rule breaks security, privacy, or correctness guarantees documented in rules{}

anti_patterns.rule: Do not run an on-device EMV kernel — card data is passthrough only
anti_patterns.why: Required by terminal-thin-client contract — violating this rule breaks security, privacy, or correctness guarantees documented in rules{}

anti_patterns.rule: Do not transmit raw biometric templates to the backend
anti_patterns.why: Required by terminal-thin-client contract — violating this rule breaks security, privacy, or correctness guarantees documented in rules{}

palm_payment_initiated.result: PGW returns settlement status; terminal shows receipt prompt

given: SPoC reader returned encrypted card payload
card_payment_initiated.result: PGW runs EMV kernel and returns auth status

pgw_unreachable.result: UI shows offline banner; no payment attempted

palm_no_match.result: UI asks to rescan or use card

related.reason: Handles biometric templates and cardholder data
Terminal is a thin client of the PGW
Palm-vein SDK for capture and on-device matching
TPM-backed attestation on every PGW call

goals.description: Android thin-client payment terminal — base UI + palm-vein capture with on-device 1:N match + card reader SPoC passthrough + PGW API client; no rail SDKs or EMV kernel on-device

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable
Sensitive fields must be encrypted at rest and never logged in plaintext

tradeoffs.reason: financial transactions must be precise and auditable

invariants: sensitive fields are never logged in plaintext
all data access is authenticated and authorized
